name: Steem
rationale: Steem (STEEM): native coin of the Steem DPoS chain; staked as Steem Power, witnesses/producers earn issuance.

name: Ardor
rationale: Ardor (ARDR): native coin of the Ardor PoS chain (Nxt successor); forging rewards.

name: IOST
rationale: IOST: native coin of the IOST L1 (Proof-of-Believability); staked for block-production rewards.

name: QuarkChain
rationale: QuarkChain (QKC): native coin of the QuarkChain sharded L1; staked/mined block rewards.

name: CENNZnet
rationale: CENNZnet (CENNZ): native coin of the CENNZnet L1; staking for security.

name: Waltonchain
rationale: Waltonchain (WTC): native coin of the Waltonchain L1 (Proof-of-Stake-and-Trust).

name: Kusama
rationale: Kusama: Polkadot canary-net L1, NPoS; validators/nominators stake KSM for chain security+rewards (DeFiLlama 'Liquid Staking' is a mislabel).

name: Neblio
rationale: Neblio (NEBL): native coin of the Neblio PoS chain; staking rewards.

name: Velas
rationale: Velas (VLX): native coin of the Velas L1 (AIDPoS); staked for chain security.

name: WaykiChain
rationale: WaykiChain (WICC): native coin of the WaykiChain DPoS L1.

name: Symbol
rationale: Symbol (XYM): native coin of the Symbol chain; PoS+ ('posplus') harvesting rewards (consensus tag the first-pass exact-set missed).

name: Ultra
rationale: Ultra (UOS): native coin of the Ultra L1 (EOSIO/DPoS).

name: Dymension
rationale: Dymension (DYM): Cosmos-SDK L1 RollApp settlement chain; DYM bonded by validators for PoS security.

name: Kujira
rationale: Kujira (KUJI): sovereign Cosmos L1; KUJI staked by validators for chain security (DeFiLlama 'Liquidations' tags its apps, not the chain).

name: Polygon (prev. MATIC)

name: Stargate Finance
